message:
fix(lib): Panic on catch continue patterns in cleanup/completion code

Changed 'catch continue' to 'catch unreachable' in:
- tabnanny.zig: indent stack tracking
- _weakrefset.zig: dead reference cleanup
- weakref/weakdict.zig: dead entry cleanup
- linecache.zig: stale cache entry removal (3 locations)
- rlcompleter.zig: tab completion matches (4 locations)
- bdb/bdb_class.zig: breakpoint collection

All prevent silently skipping items on OOM.
